archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Premium Dark Mode
emotional_tone: Sophisticated, technical, precise, premium, and reliable. Think Bloomberg Terminal meets Linear. Strictly NO flashy 'crypto-bro' neon.

typography.primary_font_usage: All Headings (H1-H4), major section titles. Weight: 400 (Light) to 600 (SemiBold).
typography.secondary_font_usage: Body text, standard UI labels. Weight: 400.
typography.mono_font_usage: ALL numeric data, prices, percentages, table cells, and probabilities. Tabular lining is mandatory for data alignment.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-rows-[auto_1fr] gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders and slight background lightness shifts to define hierarchy, not large shadows.

surfaces.panels: Solid background (bg-[#121214]) with 1px border (border-[#27272A]). No glassmorphism on main data panels to maintain contrast.

ScreenerPanel.layout: Dense data table. Use mono_font for all numeric cells.
ScreenerPanel.style: border-collapse. border-b border-[#27272A] on rows. Hover: bg-[#18181B].
ScreenerPanel.features: Sticky header for table. Sortable column headers with subtle Lucide icons.

TokenAnalysisPage.layout: Bento Grid layout. Main chart spanning col-span-2 or 3. Data widgets on the side.

MarketSummaryCard.style: Minimalist rectangular panel. High-contrast large numbers for Price, colored for 24h%.

PumpExhaustionCard.style: Gauge or progress bar showing exhaustion score. Clear status badge for phase.

AgentAnalysisPanel.style: Editorial typographic layout. Use IBM Plex Sans. Break analysis into distinct, easily scannable paragraphs with clear H4 headers. Add subtle left border (border-l-2 border-[#3F3F46]) to quote blocks.

MetricCard.style: Flat background, 1px border. Top label: tiny uppercase mono. Center value: Large mono. Bottom subtext: small muted.

ScoreGauge.style: SVG circular gauge. Transparent background. Arc stroke based on score: < 40 = Rose, 40-70 = Amber, > 70 = Emerald. Inner text: Large mono.

StatusBadge.style: Sharp edges (rounded-sm), inline-flex, uppercase mono, colored background 10% opacity with 20% opacity border.

DistributionChart.style: Minimalist histogram. Hide grid lines or make them very faint (stroke='#27272A'). Tooltip background: bg-[#18181B], border-[#3F3F46]. Reference lines for TP/SL/Current/Mean.

icons_and_assets.icon_usage: Use sparingly. 16px or 20px size. Stroke width 1.5. Colors matched to text_muted.

texture_bg.description: Optional: Dark abstract texture for login or empty states. Overlay heavily with black.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (e.g., bg-[#121214] to bg-[#18181B]). Explicit text color changes.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use tabular numerals with a subtle opacity pulse (animate-pulse) rather than generic spinners for data.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA standards. Gray text must be readable against dark gray background.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, tabs, table rows, and key metrics MUST include data-testid='...' (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required libraries if missing: lucide-react, recharts.
Import fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Do NOT use Shadcn UI's standard rounded cards or generic designs. Build raw HTML/Tailwind components with tight padding and 1px borders to achieve the 'Bloomberg/Linear' premium density.
Ensure the Screener Table is highly compact and legible. Add 'tabular-nums' utility class on all numeric data.
Do not use generic blue/purple gradients. Stick to the strictly monochrome palette with semantic colors (Emerald/Rose) only for data states.
